scripts.build: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; FILTER="Invalid input options \\(1 issue found\\)|For the \\\"define\\\"\\. +Invalid key|\\[PLUGIN_TIMINGS\\]|Your build spent significant time in plugin|See https://rolldown.rs/options/checks#plugintimings|rolldown-plugin-dts:generate|rolldown-plugin-dts:resolver"; tsdown 2>&1 | { if command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1; then rg -v "$FILTER" || true; else grep -Ev "$FILTER" || true; fi; }; status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; [ $status -eq 0 ] || exit $status; cp src/harness/harness.mjs dist/harness/harness.mjs'
